'''Anton Kale''' was a [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]], who volunteered to command the forces of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]].

==Biography==
In his early years, Kale witnessed the corruption and greed in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. This led him to become a firm supporter of both [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] and the use of force to expand the Empire. Unlike many of his peers, Kale believed in the existence of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and respected any being who could use it. These unconventional beliefs, as well as unusual strategies, ensured that Kale was a worthy adversary for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="CCW" />
